blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
